extracted.title: AGT Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED -- EFF 2/14
extracted.description: Effective 9:00AM CCT February 14, 2026, Algonquin Gas Transmission, LLC (AGT) is lifting the Hourly Customer Specific Operational Flow Order(s) issued on January 26, 2026. As a reminder, the previously posted System Wide Operational Flow Order effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 10, 2026, will remain in effect until further notice. Please refer to the table below for the effected AGT operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages: NOTE: Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
affectedLocations: Hourly Customer Specific Operational Flow Order
